purpose: Aggregate recurring elder/family need patterns from Hinata conversations into lightweight design and product-review inputs.

aggregation_fields.name: speaker_type_distribution
aggregation_fields.description: Counts by older adult / family member / institutional contact / unclear.

aggregation_fields.name: secondary_need_overlap_counts
aggregation_fields.description: Where ambiguous or mixed needs recur together.

aggregation_fields.name: hesitation_barrier_counts
aggregation_fields.description: Common barriers such as falling fear, stigma, storage, taxi dislike, or process confusion.

aggregation_fields.name: readiness_to_solution_distribution
aggregation_fields.description: How ready users are for solution/product/service discussion.

aggregation_fields.name: openness_to_product_service_distribution
aggregation_fields.description: How open users are to products/services versus needing conversation first.

aggregation_fields.name: interpretation_notes
aggregation_fields.description: Human-readable caution notes about over-interpretation risk.
